backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister with data models and CRUD operations for clients, interventions, user profiles, and media, with role-based access control via Auth mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two ClientDossierPage fix features (route parameter reading and client edit dialog) to their associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PWA with French language, viewport meta tags, manifest/icon links, Apple mobile web app settings, and a root div for the React app.
frontend/public/manifest.webmanifest: PWA web manifest for 'Vial Traite Service' defining app name, icons, display mode, theme colors, and version.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first strategy for static assets while always fetching navigation requests from the network, with old cache cleanup on activation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component setting up TanStack Router with authenticated/unauthenticated routes, React Query, theme provider, and a loading guard that waits for Internet Identity initialization before redirecting.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUnloc: Empty file placeholder for the AdminUnlockDialog component.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name for profile setup, shown only when authenticated and no profile exists yet.
frontend/src/components/blacklist/Blackl: Displays a panel to mark or unmark a client as blacklisted, showing blacklist comments and media, with confirmation dialogs for both actions.
frontend/src/components/clients/CreateCl: Modal dialog form for creating a new client with fields for name, address, phone, and email, using the useCreateClient hook.
frontend/src/components/clients/EditClie: Modal dialog form for editing an existing client's details, pre-populated from the client prop and submitted via the useUpdateClient hook.
Wrapper around the Badge UI component that adds custom color variants for success, warning, and pending states.
frontend/src/components/common/ErrorBoun: React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled errors and displays a styled error card with retry and reload options.
frontend/src/components/export/ExportDat: Dialog for exporting app data in JSON or PDF format, showing export progress via the useDataExport hook.
frontend/src/components/guards/Authentic: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the home page and shows a loading spinner while the identity is initializing.
frontend/src/components/interventions/Ad: A dialog component for creating a new intervention, with date fields (day/month/year), a comments textarea, and a media picker, using the useAddIntervention mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/interventions/Ed: A dialog component for editing an existing intervention, pre-populating fields from the provided intervention object and submitting updates via the useUpdateIntervention mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/interventions/In: A read-only dialog displaying intervention details (date, employee, comments, media) with an optional edit button that opens the EditInterventionDialog for authorized users.
Displays a list of interventions for a given client with add, edit, delete, and view actions, handling loading/error states and confirmation dialogs for deletion.
frontend/src/components/layout/MobileLay: A mobile app shell with a sticky header (logo, user name, logout button), a scrollable main content area, a fixed bottom navigation bar, and a connectivity status bar.
frontend/src/components/media/FilePicker: A button component that programmatically opens a file input dialog and calls the onSelect callback with the chosen files.
frontend/src/components/media/MediaPicke: A media management component that allows users to add media via file upload or camera capture (using a CameraDialog) and displays thumbnails with remove buttons for each selected item.
frontend/src/components/media/MediaPrevi: Renders a grid of image thumbnails from ExternalBlob objects, with optional click-to-open support using a DocumentViewer dialog for full-size viewing.
frontend/src/components/sync/Connectivit: Displays a status bar indicating offline state or pending sync operations, with a button to manually trigger synchronization when online.
frontend/src/components/technical-folder: Dialog form for creating a new folder at a given path, validating the folder name and calling the useCreateFolder mutation on submit.
Modal viewer for files (images, PDFs, videos) with zoom, rotation, fullscreen, pinch-to-zoom, and download controls.
Returns an appropriate Lucide icon component based on a file's extension (image, PDF, video, document, spreadsheet, or generic file).
Dialog for moving a file to a different folder, providing breadcrumb-based folder navigation built from existing file paths and calling the move mutation on confirm.
Dialog form for renaming a folder, validating the new name and calling the useRenameFolder mutation on submit.
Row component for a technical file entry with view, move, and delete actions, integrating DocumentViewer, MoveFolderDialog, and a delete confirmation AlertDialog.
A dialog component for uploading files to a technical folder, supporting both file selection and camera capture with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance, using the current Internet Identity for authentication and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUnlock.ts: An empty file with no content.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlacklist.ts: Provides two mutation hooks for marking and unmarking a client as blacklisted via the backend actor, with toast notifications and query invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useClients.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all clients, fetching a single client by ID, creating a client, and updating a client via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Provides hooks for fetching and saving the current caller's user profile via the backend actor, with toast notifications on mutation outcomes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDataExport.ts: A hook that fetches all clients, interventions, and technical files from the backend and exports the aggregated data as a JSON or plain-text file download with progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useInterventions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, updating, and deleting client interventions via the backend actor, with toast notifications and query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.ts: A simple hook that tracks and returns the browser's online/offline status by listening to window network events.
frontend/src/hooks/useSync.ts: Custom React hook that tracks pending sync count and syncing state, automatically triggering a sync when the app comes back online with pending operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useTechnicalFolder.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for managing technical folder files, including listing, uploading, deleting, moving, creating folders, and renaming folders via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the Vial Traite Service brand color theme in both light and dark modes, plus safe-area utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a `cn` helper that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/offline/db.ts: IndexedDB wrapper (ClientDossiersDB) providing functions to manage an offline outbox of pending operations and a general-purpose cache store.
frontend/src/offline/outbox.ts: Separate IndexedDB-backed outbox module for queuing, retrieving, and removing offline operations with a timestamp index.
frontend/src/offline/syncEngine.ts: Sync engine that reads queued offline operations and replays them against the backend actor, removing each operation after successful execution.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDossierPage.tsx: Page component displaying a single client's full dossier including their info, blacklist status, interventions list, and an edit dialog, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: Page component listing all clients with search filtering, navigation to individual dossiers, blacklist badges, and a dialog to create new clients.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page showing a calendar and a list of interventions for the selected date, with loading/error states and a detail dialog on item click.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, redirecting to the home route once authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicalFolderPage.t: Technical folder page that builds and navigates a hierarchical file/folder tree, supporting upload, folder creation, and renaming.
frontend/src/pwa/registerServiceWorker.t: Registers the PWA service worker (/sw.js) after a short delay on page load if the browser supports service workers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, font stack, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features, known issues (inaccessible client dossier page), and a pending architectural request to fix TanStack Router route registration for the client dossier.
